name: Poke Cake - Chocolate-Caramel Explosion, Death by Chocolate
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine all ingredients; beat on high for 3 minutes or until blended.
2. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 9-inch springform pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
4. Cool for 10 minutes, then remove from the pan.
CHOCOLATE-CARAMEL EXPLOSION:
5. Microwave 1 package (397g) Kraft caramels with 4 tablespoons milk on high for 3 minutes or until melted and smooth. Stir until combined.
6. Using a small wooden spoon with a handle, poke holes into the cake.
7. Pour in the caramel filling and garnish with 1/3 cup chopped roasted pecans.
DEATH BY CHOCOLATE:
8. Melt 1 package (397g) Baker's white chocolate (chopped), 1/4 cup butter, and 1/4 cup whipping cream over very low heat.
9. Stir until smooth and cool slightly.
10. Using a small wooden spoon with a handle, poke holes into the cake.
11. Pour in the chocolate filling and garnish with chocolate curls.
